emotionAnalysis.heading: Emotion AI Analysis
emotionAnalysis.mainlineSubheader: Core observations ready for your article opening
emotionAnalysis.topicsSubheader: Auto-parsed writing cards: opening, viewpoint, engagement
emotionAnalysis.topicsEmpty: No topics parsed. Showing raw Markdown below:
emotionAnalysis.copied: Copied AI writing prompt for topic {{index}}

copyPrompt.taskDesc: You are an editor for a female-focused emotional column account. Based on the topic material below, write a publish-ready article.
copyPrompt.r1: 1. Output Markdown body only. No code blocks.
copyPrompt.r2: 2. Must include: title, opening, 3-5 body sections, and ending action suggestions.
copyPrompt.r3: 3. Tone: warm but clear, empathetic, non-inflammatory, no gender antagonism.
copyPrompt.r4: 4. Do not fabricate facts. No legal/medical advice. Avoid generic platitudes.
copyPrompt.name: Topic Name
copyPrompt.extraPlaceholder: [Add your background, cases, tone preferences, and target length here]
